query: SELECT trade_name, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(scientific_name) as scientific_names FROM drug_lens GROUP BY trade_name HAVING count > 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 100
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute SELECT trade_name, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(scientific_name) as scientific_names FROM drug_lens GROUP BY trade_name HAVING count > 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 100
